note: Back-translations (TartuNLP <locale>->en) for QA review of fuzzy-flagged .po entries written by tools/translate_po.py. Where a back-translation diverges materially from the English msgid, a native speaker should review the .po entry directly (it carries the #, fuzzy flag) rather than editing this file.
engine: TartuNLP / Neurotõlge, University of Tartu — https://api.tartunlp.ai/translation/v2

et_back.Registrikood is required for an Estonian: Registrikood is required for an Estonian company.
The Registrikood must have exactly 8 digits.
et_back.KMV/VAT number must be \"EE\" followed b: The KMV/VAT number must be "EE" followed by 9 digits, e.g. EE123456789.
et_back.Company created. Estonian jurisdiction,: Company created. The Estonian jurisdiction, registrikood and KMV/VAT number were captured, but it could not yet be saved — the engine does not accept these fields in the area of company creation. It is monitored separately; the above values did not persist.
et_back.Estonian company creation is in progress: The establishment of an Estonian company is underway. These fields are captured here, but the server does not persist with them yet — see note after submission.
et_back.8-digit Estonian business registry code: 8-digit Estonian business register code (business register code).
et_back.Format: EE followed by 9 digits. Optiona: Format: EE followed by 9 digits. Optional — leave blank if not yet registered with VAT.
et_back.The engine's Estonian chart template is: Engine Estonia's chart template is registered but not yet implemented — this voter is ready for the future, not active.

ru_back.Registrikood is required for an Estonian: Registrikood is required for an Estonian company.
The Registrikood must be exactly eight digits.
ru_back.KMV/VAT number must be \"EE\" followed b: The KMV/VAT number shall be "EE" followed by nine digits, e.g. EE123456789.
ru_back.Company created. Estonian jurisdiction,: The company was created. Estonian jurisdiction, registrikood and KMV/VAT have been recorded, but they have not been preserved — the engine does not accept these fields when it is created. This indicator is monitored separately; the above values have not been maintained.
ru_back.Estonian company creation is in progress: Work is under way to establish an Estonian company. These fields are recorded here, but the server hasn't kept them yet. See the note after you present it.
ru_back.8-digit Estonian business registry code: Eight-digit Estonian Commercial Registration Code (Riregistri kood).
ru_back.Format: EE followed by 9 digits. Optiona: Format: It followed by 9 digits. Optional — leave black if not yet ever registered VAT.
ru_back.The engine's Estonian chart template is: The Estonian engine card is registered, but not yet in place — this selector is ready for the future, not active.
